criteria.name: Personalization
criteria.description: The extent to which the app adapts to individual learning styles and needs.

criteria.name: Content Generation
criteria.description: The app's ability to generate educational content such as quizzes, lesson plans, and summaries.

criteria.name: Writing Assistance
criteria.description: Capabilities for grammar checking, vocabulary enhancement, and writing style improvement.

criteria.name: Efficiency
criteria.description: How the app streamlines tasks like grading, research, and note-taking.
criteria.sources: Schools That Lead, SSBM Geneva, Edutopia

criteria.name: Interactivity
criteria.description: Level of user engagement through interactive lessons and gamified elements.
